description: A process gathered information about the operating system or hardware. Adversaries can use this to identify system vulnerabilities. Review the process tree.
name: GenericSystemInfoDiscovery

description: A process appears to be using a Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) application in a suspicious manner. This may be an attempt to gather information, gain access, or drop other malicious payloads. Investigate the process tree and the detected process.
name: SuspiciousRMMUsage

description: A process accessed system network configuration settings. Adversaries can use this for lateral movement efforts. Review the process tree.
name: GenericSystemNetworkConfigDiscovery

description: User hashes from SAM hive accessed from signed executable with untrusted root authority
name: SAMHashDump.Untrusted

threatgraph_indicators.description: A process performed reads of user key buffers. Adversaries often use this to intercept passwords and other sensitive information. Review the process tree.
An executable with two file name extensions was written. Adversaries can masquerade malware with a seemingly safe file extension to evade detection. Review the executable.

A process attempted to establish an unusual connection over a commonly used port, possibly to a command and control server. Adversaries can use this to bypass firewalls and evade detection. Review the process tree.

description: A process appears to be suspiciously executing code via Powershell. Investigate the command line and process tree.
name: GenericPowershellExecution

description: An executable with two file name extensions was written. Adversaries can masquerade malware with a seemingly safe file extension to evade detection. Review the executable.
name: DoubleExtensionWritten
